title: EXPAWLORER Christmas Cat Toys, 4pcs Xmas Soft Pillow Cat Catnip Toys with Bells Inside, Interactive Bite Resistant Fish Shape Kicker Toys for Indoor Cat Kitten Playing
features: PERFECT CHRISTMAS GIFT: The appearance of the cat kick toy is designed with a classic Christmas pattern and a special fish-shaped design, a strong Christmas atmosphere toy is the best gift your pet will receive at Christmas!

COMFORTABLE MATERIAL: Cat kicker toy is made of high quality polyester material, which can easily withstand the pressure of cat scratching and biting; filled with a large amount of PP cotton, it is soft, lightweight and elastic, suitable for your cat to snuggle and play indoors for a long time

RELIEVES BOREDOM & ANXIETY: Cat Kick Stick Toys can help cats with chase and chew training, stimulate their hunting instincts, help cats grow up better and healthier, suitable for cats to play indoors, provide happy playtime for cats

SPARK INTEREST: Christmas cat toy has natural catnip placed on the head and tail, and a bell in the center section that makes sounds to maximize cat excitement and make interactive playtime irresistible!

SUPER VALUE 4 PIECES PACK: Contains 4 cat kick stick toys with different patterns and beautiful colors, it is a cat bite, pounce and scratch. Perfect toy for indoor training; also suitable for multiple cats to avoid cat fights; it will be your cat's best playmate this winter!
description: EXPAWLORER 4 Pack Interactive Cat Toys Bite Resistant and Durable Fish Shape Kick Toys
